rows.label: qev085301_MSG0001
rows.name: It seems someone is coming mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0002
rows.name: Irina. Were you just helping out Elma?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0003
rows.name: Yes, that's right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0004
rows.name:
Perfect timing. Mind helping
out with a mission?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0005
rows.name: Is it a difficult mission?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0006
rows.name: It's not so much difficult as it is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0007
rows.name:
We got a rescue request from a Landbank
team. I want you to go help them out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0008
rows.name: It's Kias Cole and Libro Cole.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_JNK0010
rows.name: Deduce

rows.label: qev085301_SEL0011
rows.name:
Claim that the two must
be parent and child.

rows.label: qev085301_JNK0020
rows.name: Speculate

rows.label: qev085301_SEL0021
rows.name: Suggest they are brothers on good terms.

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0009
rows.name:
True, they have the same last name
and similar facial features.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0010
rows.name:
Yeah, that's right. Both the old man and
the son are a bit eccentric, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0011
rows.name:
True, they have the same last name
and similar facial features, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0012
rows.name:
Rather than brothers, don't they
feel more like parent and child?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0013
rows.name:
It's parent and child, just like
Lin says. Both the old man and the
son are a bit eccentric, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0014
rows.name:
Since they are Landbank, were they
surveying mineral resources?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0015
rows.name: They're both geologists, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0016
rows.name:
So the son has been working as his
old man's assistant for many years.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0017
rows.name: I see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0018
rows.name:
Let's go right away.
Please send the intel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085301_MSG0019
rows.name: Yeah, I'll arrange it.[ST:wait ]
